welcome: 👋 Hi, {name}! I transcribe voice messages and audio files, generate summaries and provide next-step recommendations. 🎁 Free: 5 messages / 25 minutes of audio 💎 Paid: 1 ⭐ per message or 25 ⭐ for 30 messages Just send a voice message or audio file!
welcome_back: 👋 Welcome back, {name}! 💎 Balance: {balance} messages Send a voice message or audio file.
main_menu: 📋 Main Menu Send a voice message or audio file to process. 💎 Balance: {balance} messages
free_limit_reached: 🎁 Free messages exhausted You've used all 5 free messages. Choose a payment option:
no_balance: 💎 Insufficient balance Top up your balance to process audio:
invoice_1_description: Process 1 voice message or audio file
invoice_bundle_description: Bundle: process 30 voice messages or audio files
tariff_info: 💎 Pricing 🎁 Free: 5 messages / 25 minutes ⭐ Paid: • 1 ⭐ — 1 message • 25 ⭐ — 30 messages (20% off) 💬 Current balance: {balance} messages 🎁 Free used: {free_used}/5
stats: 📊 Your Statistics 🎤 Messages processed: {total_messages} ⏱ Transcribed: {total_minutes:.1f} min 💎 Stars spent: {total_stars} ⭐ 🎁 Free used: {free_used}/5 🆓 Free minutes left: {free_minutes_left:.1f} 💬 Paid balance: {balance} messages
transcriptions_empty:
📄 You have no recordings yet.

Send a voice message or audio file!
user_blocked: 🚫 Your account is blocked. Contact the administrator.
error_processing: ❌ Error processing audio. Please try again.
error_generic: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again later.
unsupported_format: ⚠️ Unsupported format. Send a voice message or audio file (MP3, OGG, WAV, M4A, FLAC).
file_too_big: ⚠️ File is too large. Telegram only allows bots to download files up to 20 MB. Please compress the file or trim the recording and send it again.
admin_no_access: ❌ You don't have access to this command.
admin_global_stats: 📊 General Statistics 👥 Total users: {total_users} 🚫 Blocked: {blocked_users} 🎤 Total processed: {total_messages} messages ⏱ Total transcribed: {total_minutes:.1f} min
admin_finance_stats: 💰 Financial Statistics ⭐ Total stars collected: {total_stars} 💳 Transactions: {total_payments} 📅 Today: {today_stars} ⭐ 📅 Last 30 days: {month_stars} ⭐
admin_no_finance: ❌ You don't have access to financial statistics.
admin_no_manage_users: ❌ You don't have permission to manage users.
admin_enter_id: Enter the Telegram ID of the user you want to make an admin:
admin_user_not_found: ❌ User not found. They must have started the bot at least once.
admin_already_admin: ℹ️ This user is already an admin.
admin_no_add_admins: ❌ You don't have permission to add administrators.
admin_no_manage_perms: ❌ You don't have permission to manage other admins' permissions.
admin_reset_limits_ok: ✅ Limits reset. User can use 5 free messages again.
